title: Nssmf nsmf interaction connecting virtual 5g networks and subnets
abstract: A system for managing a network comprising at least one network slice instance including at least one network slice subnet instance. The system comprises a network slice management function associated with each network slice instance, the network slice management function configured to manage its associated network slice instance; and a network slice subnet management function associated with each network slice subnet instance, the network slice management function configured to manage its associated network slice subnet instance.
claims: Claims ( 29 ) AĂ‚Â systemĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â managingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â network,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â systemĂ‚Â comprising: aĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â sliceĂ‚Â subnetĂ‚Â managementĂ‚Â functionĂ‚Â (NSSMF)Ă‚Â associatedĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â sliceĂ‚Â subnetĂ‚Â instanceĂ‚Â (NSSI)Ă‚Â includingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â allocationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â functionĂ‚Â resourcesĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â functionĂ‚Â managementĂ‚Â resourcesĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â network,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â sliceĂ‚Â subnetĂ‚Â managementĂ‚Â functionĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â manageĂ‚Â operationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â NSSI;Ă‚Â and aĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â sliceĂ‚Â managementĂ‚Â functionĂ‚Â (NSMF)Ă‚Â associatedĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â sliceĂ‚Â instanceĂ‚Â (NSI)Ă‚Â thatĂ‚Â includesĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â NSSIĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â allocationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â functionĂ‚Â resourcesĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â functionĂ‚Â managementĂ‚Â resourcesĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â network,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â sliceĂ‚Â managementĂ‚Â functionĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â to:Ă‚Â manageĂ‚Â operationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â allocationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â functionĂ‚Â resourcesĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â functionĂ‚Â managementĂ‚Â resources,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â interactĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â NSSMFĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â manageĂ‚Â operationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â NSSI.
